commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Examine me, O LORD, and prove me; try my heart and my mind. Burn, like gold in the furnace. (Berthier) Purify all my affections and thoughts with the fire of divine love. Augustine; St. Jerome) Make my dispositions known to the world. I have done no one any harm. (Calmet) I take thee for the arbiter of my cause with respect to Saul, whom I have not injured. Still, as I may not be innocent, do thou try me, as thou thinkest proper. (Worthington).
